description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named build_image that uses the docker:git Docker image and the docker:dind service. In the build_image job script, run docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com, then docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/simonbreiter/issue-tracker-web-view:$CI_BUILD_REF_NAME . , and finally docker push registry.gitlab.com/simonbreiter/issue-tracker-web-view:$CI_BUILD_REF_NAME. The job runs in the default stage, has no caches, artifacts, or special rules, and pushes the built image to the GitLab Container Registry.
